og_images.design_notes: Navy ground #003A70 with Source-serif headline 'Singapore's FMCG in-store bench.', orange #F26522 underline, IBM Plex Mono 'Run on EMR-Intel' subhead, top-left Elitez person mark + wordmark, bottom-right trust line ('350+ FMCG manpower island-wide', 'L'Oréal · Unilever · Shiseido · FairPrice').

favicons.design_notes: Elitez 'person' mark (circle head + cross bar) — wordmark dropped because it doesn't read at 16px. Navy #003A70 ground + orange #F26522 mark for standard favicons; apple-touch-icon inverts to orange ground + navy mark for stronger iOS home-screen contrast.

csp_overrides: form-action: added https://formspree.io (contact form POST target)

social_meta_validated.notes: Live URL not deployed yet — validators will run post-launch (https://derrick-pixel.github.io/merchandising/). Pre-flight JSON-LD parsed clean via scripts/validate-jsonld.py.

schema_validation_method: scripts/validate-jsonld.py — parses every <script type=application/ld+json data-injected=schema-jsonld> block via json.loads, asserts Organization + WebSite present, asserts BreadcrumbList per non-index/404 page, asserts FAQPage on /contact.
pending_post_launch: Google Rich Results Test on / and /contact.html and /emr-intel.html
Schema.org Validator pass on the same three URLs
Produce /elitez-merchandising-deck.pdf — referenced from footer + /contact deck-download but not yet generated (flagged in copy.json.notes_for_human)
